meta.title: The Geopolitics of America's Shale Revolution - Keynote Speech by Mark P. Mills
meta.description: This conference examines how U.S. oil and natural gas exports reshaped the balance of global energy power, with the keynote speech by Manhattan Institute's Mark P. Mills.
